reviews.reviewTitle: The homestay is nice and clean.
reviews.originalComment: Suka sekali nginap di homestay ini...bersih dan nyaman..gak nyesal..saya sangat merekomendasikan homestay ini bila bepergian ke takengon..pengalaman luar biasa
reviews.reviewComments: I really enjoyed staying at this homestay... clean and comfortable.. no regrets.. I highly recommend this homestay when traveling to Takengon.. an amazing experience.

reviews.reviewTitle: The most comfortable accommodation when bringing the family.
reviews.originalTitle: Penginapan paling nyaman kalo bawa keluarga
reviews.originalComment:
Pertama kalinya saya ke takengon, liat di agoda ada homestay pintu waluh, 
Homestaynya bersih bangunan baru, dpt fasilitas air 1 galon, sendok piring gelas, kamar 2 kamar mandi 2, springbednyaa dan spreinya masih baruu
Homestaynya gak jauh dari danau laut tawar
Pokoknya syuka sama homestay ini, recomended utk yg bawa keluarga besar
Terimakasih agoda
reviews.reviewComments: The first time I went to Takengon, I saw on Agoda there was a homestay called Pintu Waluh. The homestay is clean, with a new building, and has facilities like 1 gallon of water, spoons, plates, and glasses, with 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. The spring beds and beddings are still new. The homestay is not far from Lake Laut Tawar. I really like this homestay, recommended for those who bring a large family. Thank you, Agoda.
rekomendasi penginapan untuk keluarga, semuanya bets deh pokoknyaaa

reviews.originalComment: Rekomendasi buat yg cari homestay harga terjangkau, bersih dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Recommendations for those looking for affordable, clean, and comfortable homestays.

Letak rumah yang tidak terlalu jauh dari pusat kota. Jalan menuju rumah cukup kecil tapi pas pasan untuk 2 mobil. areanya cukup tenang. tapi parkiran tidak ada atapnya dan kemarin sempat cukup lama mati lampu karena pemadaman kota. tapi secara umum tempat ini cukup nyaman untuk didatangi dengan keluarga atau sahabat
